analysis_info.description: Single-transaction threshold exceedance scan using DB columns (city_tier, nights, days)

thresholds_applied.travel_lodging: Per-night cap by employee_level x city_tier (04_travel_expense.md 第四条), using DB nights column
thresholds_applied.local_transport: Daily cap by city_tier: 一类120/二类100/三类80 (04_travel_expense.md 第六条), using DB days column
thresholds_applied.training_fee: Per person per session <= 3500 (05_training_expense.md 第二条)

methodology_note: Using database city_tier column (A/B/C→一类/二类/三类), nights, and days columns instead of text extraction
